title: sphenopus divaricatus f. permicranthus
intro: Sphenopus divaricatus f. permicranthus, also known as the Forked Spineflower, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its unique forked spines and bright yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Sphenopus divaricatus f. permicranthus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and treating wounds, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Sphenopus divaricatus f. permicranthus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary depending on the region and local regulations.
